UpdatePhysicalDedicatedLine.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](ET/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
UpdatePhysicalDedicatedLine.name: Dedicated line name. Supports uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, and special characters -_ /. Must start with a letter. Length: 1–65 characters.
